synopsis:
In his hut on Dagobah, Yoda is pestered by the Force spirit of Obi-Wan Kenobi, who wants him to hear out a request. Storming off in search of herbs for his soup, Yoda wanders the swamp and finds himself at the Cave of Evil. Reluctant at first, he is persuaded by Kenobi to enter and face his fears.

Inside, Yoda is confronted by apparitions of his failures: his fallen apprentice Count Dooku, the murdered Yaddle, and Keeve Trennis, all lamenting his blindness. Bail Organa, Padmé Amidala, and Mace Windu claw at him, and a flame-wreathed Anakin Skywalker accuses him of failing so many. Darth Sidious appears wielding Force lightning, naming Yoda the Sith Master's greatest unwitting servant for his role in the Jedi Order's fall. On the verge of despair, Yoda recalls a young Scalvi named Bree Menaren teaching him a game and reminding him that failure is the greatest teacher. Drawing strength from the memory, he overcomes the vision and leaves the cave.

Yoda agrees to help Kenobi and urges the spirit to go to Luke Skywalker on Hoth. The ghost vanishes, and Yoda settles in to practice, eager to keep learning despite all the mistakes still to come.
title: Yoda #10
